chapter_title.ar: باب مَوْلِدِ النَّبِيِّ ( صلى الله عليه وآله ) وَ وَفَاتِهِ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 111 – Nazool (Arrival) of the Prophet<sup>saww</sup> and his<sup>saww</sup> demise

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: صحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (5/186)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: صحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (5/186)
text: قَالَ اللَّهُ تَبَارَكَ وَ تَعَالَى يَا مُحَمَّدُ إِنِّي خَلَقْتُكَ وَ عَلِيّاً نُوراً يَعْنِي رُوحاً بِلَا بَدَنٍ قَبْلَ أَنْ أَخْلُقَ سَمَاوَاتِي وَ أَرْضِي وَ عَرْشِي وَ بَحْرِي فَلَمْ تَزَلْ تُهَلِّلُنِي وَ تُمَجِّدُنِي

ثُمَّ جَمَعْتُ رُوحَيْكُمَا فَجَعَلْتُهُمَا وَاحِدَةً فَكَانَتْ تُمَجِّدُنِي وَ تُقَدِّسُنِي وَ تُهَلِّلُنِي ثُمَّ قَسَمْتُهَا ثِنْتَيْنِ وَ قَسَمْتُ الثِّنْتَيْنِ ثِنْتَيْنِ فَصَارَتْ أَرْبَعَةً مُحَمَّدٌ وَاحِدٌ وَ عَلِيٌّ وَاحِدٌ وَ الْحَسَنُ وَ الْحُسَيْنُ ثِنْتَانِ ثُمَّ خَلَقَ اللَّهُ فَاطِمَةَ مِنْ نُورٍ ابْتَدَأَهَا رُوحاً بِلَا بَدَنٍ
ثُمَّ مَسَحَنَا بِيَمِينِهِ فَأَفْضَى نُورَهُ فِينَا .

en.hubeali: Ahmad Bin Idrees, from Al Husayn Bin Abdullah, from Muhammad Bin Isa and Muhammad Bin Abdullah, from Ali Bin Hadeed, from Murazim,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Abullah<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘Allah<sup>azwj</sup> Blessed and High Said: “O Muhammad<sup>saww</sup>! I<sup>azwj</sup> Created you<sup>saww</sup> and Ali<sup>asws</sup> as ‘نُوراً’ Light, Meaning a spirit without a body, before I<sup>azwj</sup> Created My<sup>azwj</sup> earth, and My<sup>azwj</sup> Throne, and My<sup>azwj</sup> oceans. So you<sup>asws</sup> did not cease to extol My<sup>azwj</sup> Oneness, and praising Me<sup>azwj</sup>.

Then I<sup>azwj</sup> Gathered both your<sup>asws</sup> spirits and Made these two to be one. So it was glorifying Me<sup>azwj</sup>, and extolling My<sup>azwj</sup> Holiness, and extolling My<sup>azwj</sup> Oneness. Then I<sup>azwj</sup> Divided it into two, and Divided the two into two each, so they came to be four – Muhammad<sup>saww</sup> being one, and Ali<sup>asws</sup> being one, and Al-Hassan<sup>asws</sup> and Al-Husayn<sup>asws</sup> being two. Then I<sup>azwj</sup> Created (Syeda) Fatima<sup>asws</sup> from ‘نُورٍ’ Light, Beginning her<sup>asws</sup> as a spirit without a body”.
Then He<sup>azwj</sup> Wiped us<sup>asws</sup> by His<sup>azwj</sup> Right Hand, so His<sup>azwj</sup> Light resulted into us<sup>asws</sup>’.
en.sarwar: 2. om Ahmad ibn Muhammad from al-Hajjal from Hammad from abu ‘Abdallah (a.s.) who has said the following. When mentioning the the Messenger of Allah he said, “Amir al-Mu’minin Ali (a.s.) has said, “Allah has not created any creature better than Muhammad (s.a.).”
